title: Damaged or missing shingles
observation: One or more roof shingles are damaged, loose, or missing. This condition can allow moisture intrusion if not corrected.
recommendation: Have a qualified roofing contractor evaluate and repair the affected roof covering areas.

title: Missing GFCI protection
observation: Ground-fault circuit interrupter protection was not observed at one or more required receptacle locations.
recommendation: Have a licensed electrician install GFCI protection where required for improved shock protection.

title: Active plumbing leak
observation: An active leak was observed at a plumbing supply or drain component.
recommendation: Have a licensed plumber repair the leak and evaluate adjacent materials for moisture damage.

title: Dirty HVAC filter
observation: The HVAC air filter is dirty or overdue for replacement. Restricted airflow can reduce system performance.
recommendation: Replace the filter and continue regular filter maintenance according to the manufacturer instructions.

title: Missing smoke alarm
observation: A smoke alarm was missing, not observed, or not present in an expected location.
recommendation: Install smoke alarms according to current safety standards and local requirements.

title: Negative grading near foundation
observation: Soil or hardscape appears to slope toward the foundation in one or more areas. This can direct water toward the structure.
recommendation: Improve grading or drainage so water flows away from the foundation.

title: Moisture staining observed
observation: Moisture staining was observed at an interior surface. The source and current activity could not be fully determined during a visual inspection.
recommendation: Further evaluate the area, identify the moisture source, and repair as needed.

title: Limited attic access
observation: Attic inspection was limited due to access, insulation, stored items, low clearance, or other constraints.
recommendation: Review seller disclosures and consider further evaluation if concerns are present.
